name: Takashi Andou
description: An old school-mate of Makoto's, Takashi is the leader of the G Boys, a local gang. He frequently comes off as goofy or playful, but that hides his true personality as a ruthless leader who will do anything to meet his own needs. He frequently comes to Makoto's aid whenever it is needed, but will not hesitate to ask for favors in return. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Takato Matsuda
description: Takato is the lead protagonist of Digimon Tamers. He is the only child who created his own digimon partner, Guilmon. Takato is a sweet, cheerful and a bit awkward boy who loves Digimon with all his heart, and likes drawing them and playing the Digimon card game with his friends Hirokazu and Kenta. He is kind-hearted and loyal, and is determined to protect his friends. Takato lives with his parents, Takehiro and Yoshie, in a small two-story house. name: Yuki Nekoyashiki
description: Nekoyashiki Yuki is one of the four main cures in Wonderful Precure! Yuki's true form is of a cat; however she can transform into a human. As Cure Nyammy, she forms the Nyanderful Precure duo alongside her owner [Mayu Nekoyashiki](https://anilist.co/character/323119). Yuki is gentle, yet aloof and judgmental. She is very smart, and teases Mayu about her lack of social skills.

She cares about Riku, going as far as calling herself his sister after he had lost his family. name: Harry Ord
description: Harry Ord is the head of Dianna's Royal Guard, and reports directly to the Queen herself. He pilots a distinctive gold-plated MRC-F20 SUMO and is easily one of the most skilled fighters in the series. An accomplished military strategist, Harry judges situations with a cool and rational demeanor. He is the only person who is readily able to distinguish between Kihel Heim and Dianna Soreil.
